events.name: Pub Night
events.description:
Join us for a relaxed evening at the clubhouse! Meet fellow members, enjoy some drinks, and celebrate the start of the weekend together.
Meet the New Chairman and the Committee Members

events.name: DUPR Pickleball Event
events.description: Test your skills in our upcoming official DUPR Pickleball event. Perfect for players looking to establish or improve their rating.

events.name: Summer Pickleball Festival
events.description: Welcome spring with a massive weekend Pickleball festival! Exciting matches, food, and fun for all skill levels.

events.name: The Bay Padel Tournament
events.description: Get ready for our major summer Padel tournament. Compete against top local talent and enjoy the amazing atmosphere.

events.name: Torbay Open Tennis
events.description: Our premier week-long tennis event is back. The Torbay Open attracts fantastic players for an unmissable week of high-quality tennis.

programs.title: Junior Coaching
programs.description: Ages 4-18. From mini red ball to performance squads. Our LTA accredited coaches make learning fun and effective.

programs.title: Adult Clinics
programs.description: Group sessions for all levels. Cardio tennis, tactical drills, and match play evenings to improve your game.

programs.title: Private Lessons
programs.description: 1-on-1 coaching tailored to your specific needs. Perfect for rapid improvement and technical refinement.

programs.title: Tournaments
programs.description: Regular club tournaments, box leagues, and team tennis. Compete locally and regionally representing Torquay.

programDetails.title: Junior Coaching
programDetails.subtitle: Ages 4–18 · LTA Accredited
programDetails.description: Our junior programme is designed to nurture young talent from their very first swing to competitive match play. Using the LTA progressive pathway (mini red, orange, green, and yellow ball), we ensure every child develops at the right pace.
highlights: Mini Tennis (ages 4–8): Saturday mornings, fun-first approach
Development Squads (ages 9–14): Tuesdays & Thursdays after school
Performance Squad (ages 14–18): intensive training 3× per week
Holiday camps during every school break

programDetails.title: Adult Clinics
programDetails.subtitle: All Levels · Social & Competitive
programDetails.description: Whether you want to pick up a racket for the first time or sharpen your competitive edge, our adult clinics offer something for everyone in a welcoming, social atmosphere.
highlights: Beginners Welcome: Monday & Wednesday evenings, 6–7 PM
Cardio Tennis: high-energy fitness on court, Saturdays 9 AM
Tactical Drills: intermediate & advanced, Tuesdays 7–8:30 PM
Social Mix-In: Friday evenings, play with different partners

programDetails.title: Private Lessons
programDetails.subtitle: 1-on-1 · Tailored to You
programDetails.description: Accelerate your improvement with personalised coaching from our certified professionals. Every session is customised to target your unique strengths and areas for growth.
highlights: Video analysis and technique review included
Package discounts: 5 lessons for the price of 4

programDetails.title: Tournaments & Leagues
programDetails.subtitle: Compete · Represent · Win
programDetails.description: Put your skills to the test in our regular tournaments and box leagues. From friendly internal events to representing Torquay in regional competitions, there is a competitive pathway for every ambition.
highlights: Annual Club Championships with trophies and prizes
Devon League teams across multiple divisions
Junior inter-club matches and county trials

coaches.name: James Hartley
coaches.bio: LTA Level 5 coach with 20 years of experience. Former county player who has coached nationally ranked juniors.LTA Level 5 coach with 25 years of experience! Former county player who has coached nationally ranked juniors.

coaches.name: Sophie Williams
coaches.bio: Passionate about making tennis fun for kids. Runs our award-winning mini tennis programme and holiday camps.

coaches.name: Marcus Chen
coaches.bio: Combines fitness expertise with tennis coaching. Leads our popular Cardio Tennis and adult improvement clinics.

coaches.name: Elena Rodriguez
coaches.bio: Former WTA touring professional. Specialises in match preparation and mental toughness training.

coaches.name: Tom Bradley
coaches.bio: One of the first certified padel coaches in Devon. Bringing the fastest-growing racket sport to Torquay.

coaches.name: Rachel Adams
coaches.bio: Leads our walking tennis and disability tennis programmes. Believes everyone deserves access to the sport.

coaches.name: Daniel Osei
coaches.bio: Works with our most talented juniors preparing them for county and national level competitions.

coaches.name: Katie Morrison
coaches.bio: Certified pickleball instructor bringing infectious energy to every session. Leads our social play evenings.
